content:
2026-07-17 11 AM (Chicago): We're in read-only. Votes on comments were deleted. I'm restoring from backup; I'll have to recreate the last ~30 hours from http logs.
Maybe 2-3 hours?
We hit the bug in Rails PR 57128 (root cause)
when changing a column on the comments table to be nullable (planning to then drop code references and then eventually the column).
Join chat for updates/general kibitzing.

Feel free to tell what you plan on doing this weekend and even ask for help or feedback.

Please keep in mind it’s more than OK to do nothing at all too!
